name: fhl-image-gen
description: Generate and edit images through the FHL Responses API from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit images with FHL Responses API.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin for FHL image generation and image editing through the FHL Responses API, including fixed 2K aspect presets, multi-reference input_image edits, batch generation, and adaptive runs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Generate an image with FHL Image Gen.
